case_title: CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC. VS. SAXON H WOO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100073295) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE
STATEMENT OF ACCOUNT (TRANSACTION ID # 100073295) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC.
DECLARATION (OF ALI FARZIN PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 1033(B)) (TRANSACTION ID # 100073295) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2019 CONTINUED TO AUG-06-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100073295) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, SAXON H DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-09-2018

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $280.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100073295) AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, SAXON H

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOO, SAXON H $4,481.77 PRINCIPAL, $280.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,762.72, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100073295)
DECLARATION (RE CIVIL CODE 1788.60) (TRANSACTION ID # 100073295) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-06-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
